raw.rawFrontmatter:
name: sandboxed-cli
source:
  type: cli-tool
  command: node
  args: ["scripts/run.mjs"]
  timeout_seconds: 30
  sandbox:
    profile: unrestricted-local-dev
    cwd_policy: workspace
    env_allowlist: ["GITHUB_TOKEN"]
    network: true
    writable_paths: ["."]
    require_enforcement: true
    approvedEscalation: true
runx:
  allowed_tools: ["fs.read"]

input.markdown:
---
